error_signature: output of download file is garbled
title: Garbled output from HTTP Request node
symptom: The output from the HTTP Request node is garbled and does not show the original text, causing issues with further processing in OpenAI.
applies_when: Using HTTP Request node to download files
File is being processed from Telegram
not_this_if: Output is correct for other file types
No issues with other nodes in the workflow
root_cause: The HTTP Request node may not be configured correctly to handle binary data, leading to garbled output when the file is downloaded. This can occur if the response format is not set to handle binary data properly.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings.
Ensure the 'options' field has 'download' set to true and 'responseFormat' set to 'file'.
Save the changes and re-run the workflow.
agent_instruction: Check the HTTP Request node settings and ensure proper configuration for downloading files.
